title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brigade Group Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Brigade Group Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group Ventures Solutions:
Brigade Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group Ventures Solutions!
